'''Tuttin IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tuttin system/Legends|Tuttin system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], one of the [[Six Local Systems]].

==History==
When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took over Tuttin IV, [[Tendis Ancum]] and his wife, [[Jioie Ancum]], left the planet with [[Tet Tramys]] to work for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] on [[Beltrix III]]. They left their son [[Ryley Ancum]] behind in the care of [[Shran Etison]], the local Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]].<ref name="GC6" />

Ryley arranged a personal meeting with Rebel Agent [[Keth Beamis]] concerning an Imperial shipment of heavy metals. The duo were captured and jailed overnight. Beamis consumed an [[Affide crystal/Legends|affide crystal]] to commit suicide during interrogation. Due to his protection from Etison, Ryley was released the following morning.<ref name="GC6" />

The inhabitants of the planet often joined [[Smashball/Legends|smashball]] teams, [[b'ssa nuuvu]] bands, or [[dusk]] bands for entertainment. The Empire backed the nominally independent [[Tuttin System Security Force]]. [[Tuttin Tech-Ed]] was on the planet.<ref name="GC6" />
